name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: Context menu with items, shortcuts, and keyboard navigation.
docs:
# Dropdown Menu
Context menu with items, shortcuts, and keyboard navigation.
## Import
```tsx
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuPortal, DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuSubContent, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuRadioItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuShortcut } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<DropdownMenu triggerLabel="Open menu" title={undefined} description={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **triggerLabel** (string) — default: `"Open menu"`: Trigger label
- **title** (string): Title
- **description** (string): Description
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add dropdown-menu
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/dropdown-menu
```
